calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Eric William Canady, a/k/a Aaron Malakai Smyth, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication was filed today, October 16, 2008.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Aaron Malakai Smyth.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Reset To Oct-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Eric William Canaday, a/k/a Aaron Malakai Smyth, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing as there is not a valid Proof of Publication in the case file..

Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to October 16, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
